title: acer platanoides f. globosum
intro: Acer platanoides f. globosum, also known as the ball-headed maple, is a cultivar of the Norwegian maple tree, distinguished by its unique ball-shaped or rounded crown. The medicinal properties of the Acer platanoides f. globosum include its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. This plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating diarrhea, and soothing digestive problems, due to its tannins and flavonoids content. Acer platanoides f. globosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in herbal supplements, but its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
